Localization.Description: A warning about a port state

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Many jabber packets are detected on port {object.name} of host {event_src.host}
Many CRC errors are detected on port {object.name} of host {event_src.host}
Many broadcast packets are detected on port {object.name} of host {event_src.host}
Many collisions are detected on port {object.name} of host {event_src.host}
